summary: Create a batch of BIM Viewpoints
description: Create a batch of BIM Viewpoints

bim_viewpoints.description: An array of BIM Viewpoint payloads. Limited to 100 items per request

bim_file_id.description: ID of a BIM File to be associated to the viewpoint

view_folder_id.description: ID of the BIM View Folder the viewpoint belongs to

uuid.description: Unique identifier for the Extraction viewpoint

camera_data.description: JSON string representation of camera position

sections_data.description: JSON string representation of sections applied to a 3d model as a set of clipping planes

render_mode.description: Viewer render mode when viewpoint is applied
